description: Technical requirement and verification library mapped to IQ/OQ/PQ phases.

tests.title: Installation and utility verification
tests.objective: Verify installation per manufacturer and utility readiness.
tests.acceptanceCriteria: Installation records complete and utility values meet specification.

tests.title: Labeling, safety, and calibration status
tests.objective: Verify labeling, safety features, and calibration baseline.
tests.acceptanceCriteria: All labels/safety features present; calibration records current.

tests.title: Operating range challenge
tests.objective: Demonstrate cycle execution across min/nominal/max operating ranges.
tests.acceptanceCriteria: All CPP values remain within approved limits.

tests.title: Alarm and interlock verification
tests.objective: Verify alarm detection, annunciation, and interlock response.
tests.acceptanceCriteria: All alarms/interlocks activate and recover per specification.

tests.title: Electronic record and audit trail verification
tests.objective: Verify secure access, audit trail behavior, and record retrieval.
tests.acceptanceCriteria: Part 11 controls operate as intended; records are complete/retrievable.

tests.title: Representative production performance
tests.objective: Demonstrate consistent sterilization performance under representative production conditions.
tests.acceptanceCriteria: All planned runs meet acceptance criteria with no critical deviations.

tests.title: Worst-case load challenge with monitoring
tests.objective: Verify process capability on worst-case load and throughput profile.
tests.acceptanceCriteria: Worst-case runs pass acceptance criteria and statistical monitoring thresholds.
